CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Contact Record Type names to exclude from automatic Household Member Contact Role creation. Contacts with these Record Types will not receive an Opportunity Contact Role when the Household Contact Roles On setting creates OCRs for Household members.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contact Record Types to exclude from automatic Household member Contact Role creation. Contacts with these types won't get OCRs on Household Opportunities.
CustomField.label: Household OCR Excluded Record Types
